phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Roman theatres are free to visit
phrases.text_local: L'entrée des théâtres romains est-elle gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lahn-TRAY day tay-AH-truh roh-MEHN eh-TEL grah-TWEET
phrases.cultural_note: The Roman theatres on Fourvière hill are free to visit and open daily.

responses.english: Yes, it's free and open every day.
responses.phonetic: wee, seh grah-TWEE ay oo-VEHR too lay ZHOOR
responses.local: Oui, c'est gratuit et ouvert tous les jours.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des spectacles en été dans les théâtres ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day spek-TAKL ahn ay-TAY dahn lay tay-AHT-ruh
phrases.cultural_note: The Nuits de Fourvière festival transforms these ancient theatres into live performance venues every summer. Opera, theatre, dance, and concerts take place from June to August.

responses.phonetic: lay NWEE duh foor-VYEHR, ahn ay-TAY
responses.local: Les Nuits de Fourvière, en été.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets for the festival
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on acheter des billets pour les Nuits de Fourvière ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN ash-TAY day bee-YEH poor lay NWEE duh for-VYAIR
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets for Nuits de Fourvière sell out quickly. Book online at nuitsdefourviere.fr well in advance, especially for opera and popular concerts.

responses.english: Online or at the ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask whether the site is free to visit
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que l'entrée sur le site est gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh lahn-TRAY soor luh SEET eh grah-TWEET
phrases.cultural_note: The archaeological site is free to visit during the day. The adjacent Musée Gallo-Romain de Fourvière charges a modest entry fee and offers superb context for the ruins.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view of Lyon from the site
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on a une belle vue sur Lyon depuis le site ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kohn ah oon BEL voo soor lyohn duh-PWEE luh SEET
phrases.cultural_note: The theatres are set on the Fourvière hillside and offer sweeping views across Lyon's rooftops toward the Rhône valley. The view is best on clear days in autumn.
